title: Chinese New Year capacity crunch and factory shutdown
note: Pre-CNY booking rush, rate spikes and rollover risk; factories and trucking pause during the holiday.

title: China Golden Week port and factory slowdown
note: Pre-holiday cargo rush followed by a week of reduced operations.

title: Ramadan/Eid reduced port and inland operations in Bangladesh
note: Shorter working hours and Eid closures slow discharge and inland delivery.

title: Chittagong dock workers wage agreement expiry window (illustrative)
note: Wage negotiation window; strike calls historically cluster around expiry.

title: Bangladesh general election window (illustrative)
note: Hartals and transport blockades around election periods can halt inland movement.

title: Tokyo MOU Concentrated Inspection Campaign window
note: Elevated port state control inspection intensity; detention risk for non-compliant vessels.
